channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Kalshi’s legal troubles pile up, as Arizona files first ever criminal charges over ‘illegal gambling business’
item.description: It's the latest salvo in an escalating battle between state regulators and an industry that claims it's not beholden to them.

item.title: Oh, So Now Netflix Is Interested in More Theatrical Releases
item.description: The animated series 'Stranger Things: Tales From '85' will get a special big-screen preview of its first two episodes.

item.title: Judge Says Witness Wore Smart Glasses to Sneakily Inform Their Testimony
item.description: A UK judge determined that a witness was being fed answers through his smart glasses during cross-examination.

item.title: Remedy releases its final content update for FBC: Firebreak
item.description: What a short, strange journey it's been for FBC: Firebreak; Remedy announced that the final update for the online multiplayer game is available today. But while this Open House update will be the end of new content, the studio said it plans to keep the game available."FBC: Firebreak will stay online and continue to be playable for years to come," Remedy said. "We have done engineering work to ensure we can sustain the upkeep of the relay servers when the player volume is lower."Remedy has won lots of fans for creating the eerie, surreal world where its hits Control and Alan Wake are set. FBC: ...

item.title: In Chesapeake Bay, the Primary Cause of Death for Baby Blue Crabs: The Grown-Ups
item.description: In an impressive 37-year-long investigation confirmed that the top—practically only—cause of death for young blue crabs was older crabs from their own species.

item.title: Spotify rolls out 'bit-perfect' playback in Windows app
item.description: Spotify is introducing a way for subscribers to get bit-perfect playback of songs if they listen on Windows. The company's newly announced "Exclusive Mode" gives the music streaming app complete control of audio processing on your PC so you can listen to songs exactly as they were mastered."Without Exclusive Mode turned on, your computer may alter audio before it reaches your DAC by resampling it, mixing other system sounds in, and changing the volume," Spotify writes. With the mode enabled, all other sounds from your computer are disabled so Spotify can deliver the highest quality and most ac...

item.title: What is Nvidia NemoClaw and how to try it
item.description: Nvidia is building on OpenClaw AI agents with NemoClaw.

item.title: Mistral bets on ‘build-your-own AI’ as it takes on OpenAI, Anthropic in the enterprise
item.description: Mistral Forge lets enterprises train custom AI models from scratch on their own data, challenging rivals that rely on fine-tuning and retrieval-based approaches.

item.title: This wild iPhone 17 Pro case features a touchscreen for 48MP selfies
item.description: The latest offering from Kickstarter case brand Dockcase is an iPhone 17 Pro case with a rear touchscreen.

item.title: Mistral AI launches Forge to help companies build proprietary AI models, challenging cloud giants
item.description: Mistral AI on Monday launched Forge, an enterprise model training platform that allows organizations to build, customize, and continuously improve AI models using their own proprietary data — a move that positions the French AI lab squarely against the hyperscale cloud providers in one of the most consequential and least understood markets in enterprise technology.The announcement caps a remarkably aggressive week for Mistral, which also released its Mistral Small 4 model, unveiled Leanstral — an open-source code agent for formal verification — and joined the newly formed Nvidia Nemotron Coali...

item.title: How to watch Tottenham vs. Atletico Madrid online for free
item.description: How to watch the Champions League for free. Watch Tottenham vs. Atletico Madrid in the Champions League for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch Venezuela vs. USA in the 2026 World Baseball Classic final online for free
item.description: How to watch World Baseball Classic for free. Live stream Venezuela vs. USA in the 2026 World Baseball Classic final online for free.

item.title: Americans Recognize AI as a Wealth Inequality Machine, Pollster Finds
item.description: AI is a bigger issue election issue for voters than guns, climate change, or abortion.

item.title: Why Garry Tan’s Claude Code setup has gotten so much love, and hate
item.description: Thousands of people are trying Garry Tan's Claude Code setup, which was shared on Github. And everyone has an opinion: even Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini.

item.title: I went to the Pentagon to watch Pete Hegseth scold war reporters
item.description: It is day 13 of America's surprise war with Iran - by sheer coincidence, it's Friday the 13th - and I am delirious. I haven't had a coffee since I woke up at 5AM, because I'm not allowed to bring outside beverages into the Pentagon (the security screening cutoff was at 7AM for the 8AM), […]

item.title: The Beats Studio Pro are nearly $200 off ahead of Amazon’s big spring sale
item.description: Earlier this week, Apple unveiled the AirPods Max 2. The forthcoming over-ear headphones build on their predecessor with an H2 chip that powers a range of new features; however, they still don’t offer the sort of cross-OS compatibility you’ll get with a modern pair of Beats headphones — including the Beats Studio Pro, which are […]

item.title: DoorDash Reservations Scored America’s Most Exclusive Restaurants
item.description: After the rise (and fall) of reservation scalping, DoorDash and a host of apps are fighting to book you a seat at the country’s most exclusive restaurants.

item.title: Rebecca Ferguson Says She Has Just One Scene in ‘Dune: Part Three’
item.description: Sorry, Lady Jessica fans: Ferguson's character plays a much smaller part in Denis Villeneuve's next Frank Herbert adaptation.

item.title: Nintendo’s Talking Flower Is Annoying as Hell. I Love It
item.description: This $35 toy flower with a speaker is like having an annoying, noisy, lovable pet that you can tell to shut up.

item.title: Tecovas identified a storytelling OKR. It became a true ‘Love Letter to Texas’
item.description: Speaking at the Fast Company Grill at SXSW, CEO David Lafitte explained the Western apparel brand’s company-wide goal that focused on storytelling. About three years ago, David Lafitte surveyed the website, social media, and marketing content from Tecovas, the Western apparel brand he leads, and realized that the messaging had become “very diluted.”...

item.title: Apple rolls out first ‘background security’ update for iPhones, iPads, and Macs to fix Safari bug
item.description: Apple's first-ever "background security improvement" fixes a vulnerability in its Safari browser running its latest software.

item.title: How Do You Photograph a Chicken Inside an Egg?
item.description: Science photographer Anand Varma figured it out.

item.title: Kagi brings its ‘small web’ of a human-only internet to mobile devices
item.description: Kagi's "Small Web" offers a handpicked collection of more than 30,000 non-commercial, human-authored websites, including personal blogs, webcomics, and independent videos.

item.title: Notre entretien avec Kirsten Siebach : comment la Lune prépare déjà les humains à Mars
item.description: Alors que la Nasa se prépare à lancer Artemis II en vue d'un nouveau retour sur la Lune, une ambition encore plus grande émerge : celle d'organiser les premières expéditions humaines vers Mars. Chaque mission lunaire du programme Artemis servira non seulement à préparer les hommes à vivre sur la...

item.title: The Last of Us season 3 has just cast an important role — and they're played by a popular horror actor
item.description: The Last of Us season 3 just got a major addition to the cast, and you've definitely seen them before.

item.title: 'Unreliable and untruthful': London judge says witness got real-time coaching from their smart glasses — and then blamed ChatGPT
item.description: A London judge has dismissed the evidence of a witness after they were found to be getting real-time help from someone via their smart glasses.

item.title: Next-Gen Gaming Laptops Will Have Better Screens and Chips—and Cost Way More
item.description: Intel’s updated high-end laptop chips aren’t as interesting as updated screens.
